12.4.1 ok are you connected to a network

ok thats enough info let me check your ticket

nodes.speaker: TARGET

ok let me reschedule for you
could you please submit a new ticket

nodes.speaker: TARGET

nodes.speaker: TARGET

could you please submit a new ticket

nodes.message: youre joking right

its standard procedure
thank you for your support have a nice day
